rationale: The citing paper references Duan and Mela (2009) once in a grouped parenthetical citation to support a broad background claim that spatial factors affect demand and supply in geographic markets. It does not engage this specific paper's model, assumptions, measures, or findings in the development of the CSIS method, hypothesis logic, or empirical implementation. The main methodological and empirical contributions are presented without a distinct functional dependence on this cited study.
